name: Pizzapunk
author: Poki
description: Pizzapunk is a fun game where you have to serve pizza by throwing them to your customers! Hit five perfect throws in a row to gain a speedboost. Can you deliver all the pizzas?  About the creator:  Pizzapunk was created by Leke Sahatqija. This is his second game on Poki, after Colorballs 3D.
